languages.text: "Докладываю: группа техножрецов корабля под предводительством Мастера двигателя просит дозволения провести на палубе церемонию благодарности. Насколько я понимаю, это связано с вашим особым отношением к Сектору Бионика. Что им ответить, Лорд-капитан?"

"Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"
languages.original_text: "Докладываю: группа техножрецов корабля под предводительством Мастера двигателя просит дозволения провести на палубе церемонию благодарности. Насколько я понимаю, это связано с вашим особым отношением к Сектору Бионика. Что им ответить, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "Reporting: a group of the ship's Tech-Priests , overseen by the Drivesmaster, requests clearance for a gratitude ceremony on deck. This is presumably due to your specific attention to the Sector Bionica. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a group of the ship's Tech-Priests , overseen by the Drivesmaster, requests clearance for a gratitude ceremony on deck. This is presumably due to your specific attention to the Sector Bionica. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, overseen by the Drivesmaster, requests clearance for a gratitude ceremony on deck. This is presumably for your specific attention to the Sector Bionica. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Reporting: a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, overseen by the Drivesmaster, requests clearance for a gratitude ceremony on deck. This is presumably for your specific attention to the Sector Bionica. Your orders, Lord Captain?"

"Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, eine Gruppe von Techpriestern, angeführt von der Triebwerksmeisterin, bittet um die Erlaubnis einer Dankeszeremonie an Deck. Ich denke, es geht um die Aufmerksamkeit, die Ihr dem Sektor Bionica gewidmet habt. Wie lauten Eure Befehle?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, eine Gruppe von Techpriestern, angeführt von der Triebwerksmeisterin, bittet um die Erlaubnis einer Dankeszeremonie an Deck. Ich denke, es geht um die Aufmerksamkeit, die Ihr dem Sektor Bionica gewidmet habt. Wie lauten Eure Befehle?"

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, un groupe de technoprêtres du vaisseau, supervisé par la maîtresse des machines, demande l'autorisation d'organiser une cérémonie de gratitude sur le pont. Je crois comprendre que c'est en lien avec vos actions au secteur Bionica. Quels sont vos ordres ? »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, un groupe de technoprêtres du vaisseau, supervisé par la maîtresse des machines, demande l'autorisation d'organiser une cérémonie de gratitude sur le pont. Je crois comprendre que c'est en lien avec vos actions au secteur Bionica. Quels sont vos ordres ? »

languages.text: “舰长大人，由驱动大师率领的一队技术神甫，请求获准在甲板上举行感恩仪式。据我了解，这是为了感谢您对仿生区的关照。您有何指示？”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，由驱动大师率领的一队技术神甫，请求获准在甲板上举行感恩仪式。据我了解，这是为了感谢您对仿生区的关照。您有何指示？”

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, un grupo de tecnosacerdotes de la nave, encabezados por la maestra de motores, solicita permiso para una ceremonia de agradecimiento en cubierta. Si no me equivoco, se debe a la atención que ha dedicado al Sector Bionica. ¿Qué ordena?».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, un grupo de tecnosacerdotes de la nave, encabezados por la maestra de motores, solicita permiso para una ceremonia de agradecimiento en cubierta. Si no me equivoco, se debe a la atención que ha dedicado al Sector Bionica. ¿Qué ordena?».

languages.text: "報告：エンジン・マスター率いる船の技術オタク集団が、甲板で感謝のセレモニーを行う許可を求めている。バイオニック・セクターとの 特別な関係に 関係があるようです彼らの反応は？
languages.original_text: "Report: a group of the ship's techno-geeks, led by the Engine Master, request permission to hold a ceremony of appreciation on deck. I understand it has to do with your special relationship to the Bionic Sector. What is their response, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: "Motor Üstadı'nın liderliğindeki bir grup gemi Tekno Rahibi, güvertede şükran töreni düzenlemek için izin istiyor Lord Kaptan. Anladığım kadarıyla bu, Sektör Biyonika'ya gösterdiğiniz ilgiyle alakalı. Emirleriniz neler?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a group of the ship's Tech-Priests, lead by the Drivesmaster, requests permission to conduct a gratitude ceremony on deck. As I understand, this relates to the attention you have shown to the Sector Bionica. What are your orders?"

traits.locale_text: "Motor Üstadı'nın liderliğindeki bir grup gemi Tekno Rahibi, güvertede şükran töreni düzenlemek için izin istiyor Lord Kaptan. Anladığım kadarıyla bu, Sektör Biyonika'ya gösterdiğiniz ilgiyle alakalı. Emirleriniz neler?"
